title: Lekkerman Clientside
description: Client-side modpack, with which you can join vanilla servers. Improves immersion and has many quality-of-life mods.
body:
A nice modpack for joining vanilla servers. Adds a map, graphical and sound upgrades, HUD improvements, performance increasing mods and quality-of-life mods.
Version 1.21.11: ### Extra features worth mentioning: (Some of these might be considered cheating on some servers, but they'll work fine on a private vanilla server.)
  • Invite friends to your single-player world via Essential.
  • Litematica: Build with schematics, if you want.
  • Minimap (Press "m" to toggle and "j" for map interface).
  • Custom notes per world (press "n").
  • Middle click in a container to sort the items.
  • Click through signs on chests.
  • Zoom with "c".
  • Non-cheat Freecam with "F4".
  • View long distances with Distant Horizons.
  • R-Click armor item in inventory to equip them, or sneak + r-click to swap armor with armor stand.
  • Scroll inventory column with "Alt".
  • Search full chest history (~/^)
  • Emote each other (b) even without Emotecraft installed on the server.
  • Smart Item Swapping with "r".
  • Jump over fences and gates.
  • Options to stack inventory to nearby chests that have matching items.

Version 1.21.10: ### Extra features worth mentioning:
  • Litematica: Build with schematics, if you want. (Press "u" to download schematics)
  • R-Click armor item in inventory to equip them.
  • Minimap (Press "m" to toggle and "j" for map interface).
  • Middle click in a container to sort the items.
  • Click through signs on chests.
  • Zoom with "c".
  • Non-cheat Freecam with "v".
  • Scroll inventory column with "Alt".
  • Invite friends to single player worlds.
  • Nice datapacks to choose from, including structures, world-gen and Jake's Build Tools.
  • Built-in Minesweeper game for more fun semi-afk sessions.

Version 1.20.4:

### Social:

* Essential (Invite friends into your single player world / emotes / cosmetics / etc.) * Chat heads * Daily dad * More chat history * No Chat Reports

### Inventory/Storage/Crafting:

* Chest Tracker * Searchables * Click Through * Crafting Tweaks * EMI * EMI Trades * Equipment Compare * Inventory Essentials * Stack to nearby chests * Mouse Wheelie * Inventory Profiles Next * Simple Shulker Preview * Shulker Box Tooltip

### Building:

* Bridging Mod * Build Guide

### HUD/GUI:

* Appleskin * Autohud * Better Mount HUD * Idwtialsimmoedm * Jade * Simple HUD Enhanced * Splashfox * GUI Followers * Main Menu Credits * Paginated Advancements & Custom Frames * Frostbyte's Improved Inventory * BetterShields * BactroMod * Stonecutter GUI Remastered * Blur

### Navigation:

* Journeymap * Zoomify

### Movement:

* ThirdPersonBoating

### Sound:

* Ambient Sounds * Presence Footsteps * Sheep Squeak * Sound Physics Remastered * Realistic Combat Soundpack * Dynamic Surroundings: Fabric Edition * Adventure Redefined

### Graphics:

* Fresh Animations * Capes * Wavey Capes * Better Zombies * [EMF] Entity Model Features * [ETF] Entity Texture Features * Continuity * Explosive Enhancement * Falling Leaves * Indium * Interactic * Iris Shaders * Visuality * FabricSkyboxes * FabricSkyBoxes Interop * Model Gap Fix * OptiGUI * Nautilus3D * Limited Life Armor * Wakes * Better Clouds * Better Beds * Serious Player Animations * Player Animator * Make Bubbles Pop * Not Enough Animations

### Performance:

* Dynamic FPS * Entity Culling * Fast Quit * Ferrite Core * Immediately Fast * Lithium * ModernFix * More Culling * Reeses Sodium Options * Sodium * Sodium Extra * Remove Reloading Screen

### Management:

* Amecs * Antighost * Better F3 * Better Statistics Screen * Cherished Worlds * Continue Button * Language Reload * Mod Menu * MixinTrace * Notes * Borderless Mining * Controlify * Debugify * Fabrishot * Your Options Shall Be Respected (YOSBR) * Modpack Update Checker * Death Log

### Shaders:

* Complementary Shaders - Unbound + Euphoria Patches

### Dependancies:

* Balm * Cloth Config * Collective * CreativeCore * Fabric API * Fabric Language Kotlin * Forge Config API Port * Iceberg * M.R.U * Owo-Lib * Yet another config lib * Puzzle * UkuLib * libIPN

Version 1.19.3:

### Social mods:

* Essential (Invite friends into your single player world, cosmetics, zoom, etc.) * More chat history * Daily dad * Stendhal (fancy in-game text edits) * Craft Presence * Chat Heads

### Inventory/Storage/Crafting Mods:

* EMI & EMI Trades * Inventory Profiles Next * Stack to nearby chests * Click Through (click through signs on chests) * Recipe Book is pain (recipe book re-arranged similar to creative mode) * Idwtialsimmoedm & Enchanting Table Descriptions (Shows enchantment descriptions) * Crafting Tweaks (r-click full stack, clearing, etc.) * Item Swapper (Press "r" to switch to similar items, like tools/weapons) * Adaptive tooltips

### Building Mods:

* Bridging Mod (place blocks beneath/behind a block)

### HUD Mods:

* Detail Armor Bar * Simple HUD Utilities * Jade (Shows what you're looking at)

### Navigation Mods:

* Journeymap

### Movement Mods:

* Camera Overhaul

### Sound Mods:

* Jingle (hear when loading is done) * Presence Footsteps * Auditory

### Graphics:

* Distant Horizons, for far viewing distances... or Shaders, if shaders are preferred. * Classic 3D Resource Pack * Visuality * Interactic * Super fancy coulds (when not using shaders) * Explosive Enhancement * Falling Leaves * Biome Particle Weather

### Management:

* Cherished Worlds (Favorite/pin/bookmark worlds) * Advancement Info (More details about your advancements) * Notebook (Accessible in your menu, for taking notes) * Language Reload (Change Language in-game) * Better Statistics Screen * Better F3

### Shaders (to choose from):

* BSL * Contemporary

(Logo design by Freepik.)
